title: Thriller Bark’s Zombies Awaken
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #10, Whitebeard, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #1, Perona as the scene develops across pages 0–3.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Unknown person #10, Whitebeard, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #1, focusing on the immediate stakes of thriller bark’s zombies awaken.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hey, what are you doing, new guy?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: So, why... can he defy them?!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: The name of that Hurricane is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It reminds me of Sanji- Kan....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We're Sanji's friends, so any help...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Stop with your fucking mumbling, pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Whaa!! He really is our enemy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Let me catch you. Huhuuhu!!! huhu!!! :)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: B-But I haven't stolen anything yet!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I won't give AB-SAMA to you!!!

summary: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Unknown person #10, Whitebeard, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #1, focusing on the immediate stakes of thriller bark’s zombies awaken.
